result:
Token-saver mode active.

The module is small order utilities: sum an order's items (`calcTotal`), apply percentage discount codes (`applyDiscount`), compute average item price, and format an order as text with its discounted total.

Bugs:
1. `orders.js:5` — off-by-one: `i <= items.length` reads one past the end, so `items[i].price` throws `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined` on every call. This breaks `calcTotal` and everything that uses it (`averageItemPrice`, `formatOrder`).
2. `orders.js:20` — `averageItemPrice([])` divides 0 by 0, returning `NaN` instead of a sensible value (once bug 1 is fixed; currently it throws first).
